title: LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) & QLoRA
description: Implement Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods like LoRA and QLoRA. Adapt massive models to specific tasks with minimal VRAM and compute requirements.
objectives: Implement Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods like LoRA and QLoRA.
Adapt massive models to specific tasks with minimal VRAM and compute requirements.
